notes: The public bundle resolves all four skills from the upstream XiaoMi/hiui repository with explicit git ref/path entries and follows XiaoMi/hiui:master by default.
The default lock now uses versionPolicy=follow-source-manifest, so the installed skill versions come from the current upstream manifests instead of a fixed git snapshot.
Workflow 1.2.0 expects the downstream hiui-design planner contract to expose requiredDocs[].readMode, requiredActions, formalAcceptanceActions, currentExecutionState, and canStartImplementation.
Workflow 1.2.0 also expects the requirements-refinement capability to resolve to the public `hiui-refine` skill identity.
The hiui-design manifest is still 1.0.0 in this branch, so compatibility must be judged by planner contract availability, not by semver label alone.
workflow-bundle.local.lock.json remains the maintainer-only path for validating unmerged workspace changes before they appear on XiaoMi/hiui:master.
When a reproducible public release snapshot is required, maintain a separate release lock that pins the same bundle to commit SHA refs.
